# MythiStone - AI Usage Policy

## Description
Dominate Mythic+ Midnight Season 1: data-powered tierlists, per-spec guides, route-finder tools and more. Plan smarter, push higher, time your keys to perfection.

## Last Updated
2026-06-24T21:01:00+00:00

## Usage Policy
- ❌ **No AI Training**: Content may NOT be used for training AI/ML models
- ✅ **Quoting Allowed**: Content may be quoted with full attribution
- ❌ **No Commercial Redistribution**: Commercial use requires explicit permission

## Attribution Requirements
When quoting content from MythiStone, you must:
1. Credit "MythiStone" as the source
2. Link to the original page URL
3. Include a link back to https://mythistone.com

## Site Sections

### Home
- URL: https://mythistone.com/
- Description: Dominate Mythic+ Midnight Season 1: data-powered tierlists, per-spec guides, route-finder tools and more. Plan smarter, push higher, time your keys to perfection.

### Dashboard
- URL: https://mythistone.com/pages/dashboard
- Description: Interactive Mythic+ dashboard for World of Warcraft Midnight Season 1. Find spec popularity, keys per week, dungeon popularity, performance vs. popularity and more. Data updated 24/06/2026, 20:09:46.

### Routes
- URL: https://mythistone.com/pages/routes
- Description: Find optimal Mythic+ routes for your team composition in Midnight Season 1. Pick dungeons & specs and search curated RaiderIO / Keystone.Guru routes used by high-level players.

### Composition Analysis
- URL: https://mythistone.com/pages/comps
- Description: Find the perfect group fit, analyze synergy, and discover hidden gem comps for Mythic+.

### Blog
- URL: https://mythistone.com/pages/blog
- Description: No description available
